result.stdout:
USAGE:
    hades <FILE> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <FILE>     

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information
    -n, --name <NAME>                                 
    -v, --version <VERSION>                           
    -o, --output <FILE>
